payload.message: Run the daily portfolio health check. Follow the Daily Health Check Protocol from your monitoring skill. Fetch all listings, store snapshots, compute booking pace, detect stale syncs, and generate the portfolio health summary report.

Run the daily portfolio health check. Follow the Daily Health Check Protocol from your monitoring skill. Fetch all listings, store snapshots, compute booking pace, detect stale syncs, and generate the portfolio health summary report.

Generate the weekly optimization report with pricing recommendations. Follow these protocols in order:

1. Weekly Optimization Report Protocol (analysis skill): Compute portfolio KPIs with week-over-week and STLY comparisons. Detect underperforming listings and provide specific recommended actions.

2. Orphan Day Detection Protocol (optimization skill): For each listing, scan the next 30 days for 1-3 night unbookable gaps between bookings. Exclude owner blocks (unbookable dates). Present specific fill strategies with recommended DSOs for any orphan gaps found.

3. Demand Spike Detection Protocol (optimization skill): Scan the next 90 days for clusters of high-demand dates (red demand_color) without existing DSOs. Check if the algorithm has already elevated pricing before recommending. Recommend event-based percentage overrides where appropriate.

4. Base Price Calibration Check (optimization skill): If it has been 30+ days since the last base price review for any listing, compare the listing's base price to neighborhood percentiles and recommended_base_price. Show full min/max price impact for any recommended changes.

Present the top 3-5 highest-priority recommendations that require approval. Follow the Recommendation Prioritization protocol from your optimization skill (orphan days first, then demand spikes, then base price). Log the report when complete.
